---
title: "Context-dependent information transfer in birds"
image: "../images/card_pics/song_wren.jpg"
description: "Using fine-scale time-series analysis, we investigate what counts as “information” in animal signaling and how its transmission shifts with social context, showing that birds convey the most information during high-threat territorial encounters."
categories: ["Animal Communication & Contest Dynamics"]
contributors: "BCL"
feature_order: "NA"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
